name: Hector Ruiz
description: A broad-shouldered man behind the foreman's desk with the blinds shut against the foundry floor, working a slow burn scar across one palm.
background: Ran the foundry floor for twenty years and knew every worker on it by their walk.
personality: Steady and paternal on the surface, hollowed out underneath — he keeps busy so he doesn't have to sit with it.
secret: He sent his crew back onto the floor for the equipment when the alarms went, and he came out and they did not.
notes: T45 · The Ironworks. Skill: industrial/leadership. Hook: survivor's guilt; the foundry (a live screamer node) is where it happened.
